sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الْقِرَاءَةَ مُهِمَّةٌ جِدًّا فِي حَيَاةِ الْإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da je čitanje veoma važno u životu čovjeka.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that reading is very important in a person's life.

sentences.arabic: تُفِيدُنَا الْقِرَاءَةُ فِي تَعَلُّمِ أَشْيَاءَ جَدِيدَةٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Čitanje nam pomaže da svaki dan naučimo nove stvari.
sentences.translationEn: Reading helps us to learn new things every day.

sentences.arabic: مَنْ يَقْرَأُ كَثِيرًا يَتَكَلَّمُ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translationEn: A person who reads a lot speaks better.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَقْرَأَ كِتَابًا كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Volim svake sedmice pročitati jednu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: I like to read a book every week.
